description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low, dark boundary wall and featuring a spacious yard with landscaping elements such as a tree and a bush. The house has a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design with beige and white exterior walls, accented by large windows and a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio area. The front of the house includes a prominent staircase leading up to the main entrance, which is elevated above ground level and flanked by a small balcony. There are two visible garage doors beneath the main living area, providing access to covered parking. The yard includes a swing set and paved walkways, suggesting a family-friendly environment. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and functional modern aesthetics.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a glass sunroom, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. Features include a prominent staircase, garage, and outdoor play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance staircase, garage doors, glass sunroom, and a tree in the yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swing set, and the back staircase leading to the upper level.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, sunroom extension, and the open paved area with landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the sunroom, garage, and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Elevated main entry with exterior staircase, small balcony, and glass door; no porch or columns
